calendar.description: Senate Economic Development and Workforce Services Hearing
House Economic Development and Workforce Services Hearing

general_provisions: This bill establishes a partnership to support community-based partnerships focused on educational and economic outcomes.
hilighted_provisions: This bill:<hr><ltbullet>defines terms;<hr><ltbullet>requires the Governor's Office of Economic Opportunity to designate a technical assistance provider to support eligible communities;<hr><ltbullet>specifies criteria for eligible communities;<hr><ltbullet>establishes requirements for cross-sector partnerships;<hr><ltbullet>establishes data sharing provisions; and<hr><ltbullet>requires reporting on partnership activities.
